project_overview.name: ChronoWeave Timeline Visualizer
project_overview.description: A dual-theme (Fantasy & Sci-Fi) interactive timeline visualizer for world-builders.

setup_instructions.step_1_dependencies: Execute: yarn add tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge sonner date-fns
setup_instructions.step_3_configure_tailwind: Update tailwind.config.js to include content paths: ['./src/**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}']. Add theme extensions defined in 'colors' section.
setup_instructions.step_4_css_reset: Create src/index.css with @tailwind directives. Import this in src/index.js. Remove old GlobalStyles.

TimelineContainer.description: Main scrollable area. Needs 'overflow-x-auto', 'whitespace-nowrap', and custom scrollbar styling.

TimelineAxis.description: The central line. Needs to handle negative (BCE) and positive years.

styles.fantasy: h-1 bg-amber-900 shadow-sm border-t border-amber-700 opacity-80

EventMarker.description: The node on the timeline. Clickable to open card.

styles.fantasy: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-red-900 border-2 border-amber-400 shadow-md transform hover:scale-125 transition-transform cursor-pointer
styles.scifi: w-3 h-3 rotate-45 bg-black border border-cyan-400 shadow-[0_0_8px_#00f3ff] hover:bg-cyan-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_#00f3ff] transition-all cursor-pointer

EventCard.description: Expandable details. Shows title, date, image, description.

styles.fantasy: bg-[#f9f1d8] border-4 border-double border-amber-900/40 text-amber-950 font-serif p-6 shadow-xl rounded-sm max-w-md
styles.scifi: bg-slate-900/90 border border-cyan-500/50 text-cyan-50 font-mono p-6 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,243,255,0.15)] backdrop-blur-md max-w-md relative overflow-hidden

ThemeSwitcher.description: Toggle between themes. Positioned absolute top-right.
ThemeSwitcher.styles: fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 px-4 py-2 rounded font-bold transition-all

universal_guidelines: Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (e.g., 'timeline-marker', 'theme-toggle').
Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards, especially in Sci-Fi mode (cyan on dark).
Implement 'smooth' scrolling for the timeline container.
Use Framer Motion for card expansion (layoutId) and hover effects.
Do not use native alert() or confirm(); use Sonner toasts for notifications.
Structure the project features in 'src/features' or 'src/components' clearly.
